scope: A-share factor-hypothesis generation and the performance-forecast text increment test

sources.title: JYDB market, financial statement, and security master tables
sources.locator: SUFE-provided JYDB; concrete table mappings are recorded by the local export SQL
sources.coverage: A-share prices, fundamentals, valuation, industry, and historical security metadata
sources.usage_boundary: Schema metadata and derived research artifacts may be versioned; raw licensed rows must not be committed

sources.title: JYDB LC_PerformanceForecast
sources.coverage: A-share performance-forecast publication date, structured forecast fields, consensus forecast, and forecast text
sources.usage_boundary: Only schema, deterministic extracts, hashes, and derived features may enter the repository; raw licensed text stays local

sources.title: CNINFO listed-company disclosures
sources.locator: 上市公司公告与定期报告
sources.usage_boundary: Reference and manual provenance checks only; not the current core backtest source

sources.title: Shanghai Stock Exchange listed-company disclosure portal
sources.locator: 沪市上市公司公告与信息披露规则
sources.usage_boundary: Institutional-rule reference; numerical backtest data remains JYDB-only

sources.title: Shenzhen Stock Exchange listed-company disclosure portal
sources.locator: 深市上市公司公告与信息披露规则
sources.usage_boundary: Institutional-rule reference; numerical backtest data remains JYDB-only

sources.title: Microsoft Qlib
sources.coverage: Formula-style feature construction and deterministic data pipelines
sources.usage_boundary: Method reference only; formulas are not copied as research findings

sources.title: Automate Strategy Finding with LLM in Quant Investment
sources.coverage: LLM-assisted seed-alpha proposal and multi-agent evaluation
sources.usage_boundary: Research rationale only; all project metrics remain deterministic

fields.label: 复权开盘价
fields.pit_rule: Only the same trading date value is used for forward-return tests
fields.usage_boundary: Requires an audited adjustment convention

fields.label: 复权最高价
fields.pit_rule: Only the same trading date value is used for forward-return tests
fields.usage_boundary: Requires an audited adjustment convention

fields.label: 复权最低价
fields.pit_rule: Only the same trading date value is used for forward-return tests
fields.usage_boundary: Requires an audited adjustment convention

fields.label: 复权收盘价
fields.pit_rule: Only the same trading date value is used; labels are shifted forward outside the expression engine
fields.usage_boundary: Requires an audited adjustment convention

fields.label: 成交量
fields.pit_rule: Same trading date observation
fields.usage_boundary: Unit and adjustment convention must be recorded by export

fields.label: 成交额
fields.pit_rule: Same trading date observation
fields.usage_boundary: Currency and unit must be recorded by export

fields.label: 复权因子
fields.pit_rule: Vendor adjustment convention must be fixed before use
fields.usage_boundary: Not used as a future corporate-action oracle

fields.label: 市值
fields.source_table: market-value export or close times PIT shares
fields.pit_rule: Raw daily market value or close multiplied by PIT-merged shares outstanding
fields.usage_boundary: Raw and inferred values must expose provenance

fields.label: 历史行业分类
fields.pit_rule: Historical classification valid on the trading date; current membership cannot be backfilled
fields.usage_boundary: Classification system and version must be fixed

fields.label: 财务报告期
fields.pit_rule: May identify a disclosed report but can never replace ann_date as the availability boundary
fields.usage_boundary: Identifier only; no report-period look-ahead

fields.label: 财务公告日
fields.pit_rule: T-day rows may only use records whose ann_date is no later than T
fields.usage_boundary: Vendor timestamp accuracy remains an external assumption

fields.label: 总资产
fields.pit_rule: Latest record with ann_date no later than the trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Use the configured consolidated-statement mapping

fields.label: 股东权益
fields.pit_rule: Latest record with ann_date no later than the trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Parent/consolidated attribution must be fixed

fields.label: 净利润
fields.pit_rule: Latest record with ann_date no later than the trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Attribution and cumulative-period conventions must be fixed

fields.label: 营业收入
fields.pit_rule: Latest record with ann_date no later than the trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Cumulative-period convention must be fixed

fields.label: 经营活动现金流
fields.pit_rule: Latest record with ann_date no later than the trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Cumulative-period convention must be fixed

fields.label: 总股本
fields.pit_rule: Only the latest disclosed share count may be used for inferred market value
fields.usage_boundary: Prefer effective-date share-capital data when available

fields.label: 每股净资产
fields.pit_rule: Latest record with ann_date no later than the trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Share-count and attribution conventions must be fixed

fields.label: 每股收益
fields.pit_rule: Latest record with ann_date no later than the trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Basic/diluted and cumulative-period conventions must be fixed

fields.label: 滞后20日市场收益状态量
fields.source_table: deterministic derivation from PIT-safe close panel
fields.pit_rule: Equal-weight market daily returns are aggregated through T-1 only
fields.usage_boundary: Market definition and equal-weight aggregation are fixed before testing

fields.label: 滞后20日市场波动率状态量
fields.source_table: deterministic derivation from PIT-safe close panel
fields.pit_rule: Realized volatility is computed from market returns through T-1 only
fields.usage_boundary: Window and market aggregation are fixed before testing

fields.label: 滞后市场上行状态
fields.pit_rule: Binary state is determined entirely from the lagged market-return state variable
fields.usage_boundary: May only be consumed as a binary where() condition

fields.label: 滞后市场高波动状态
fields.pit_rule: Binary state and baseline are determined entirely from volatility observed through T-1
fields.usage_boundary: May only be consumed as a binary where() condition

fields.label: 业绩预告披露日
fields.pit_rule: A forecast published on T becomes usable from the next trading date
fields.usage_boundary: Conservative T+1 rule because timestamp precision is inconsistent

fields.label: 业绩预告类型
fields.pit_rule: Use only from the first trading day after publication
fields.usage_boundary: Vendor code mapping must be versioned

fields.label: 预告增长率下限
fields.pit_rule: Use only from the first trading day after publication
fields.usage_boundary: Missing growth for loss-turnaround categories must remain missing

fields.label: 预告增长率上限
fields.pit_rule: Use only from the first trading day after publication
fields.usage_boundary: Missing growth for loss-turnaround categories must remain missing

fields.label: 预告净利润下限
fields.pit_rule: Use only from the first trading day after publication
fields.usage_boundary: Currency unit and attribution must be audited

fields.label: 预告净利润上限
fields.pit_rule: Use only from the first trading day after publication
fields.usage_boundary: Currency unit and attribution must be audited

fields.label: 净利润同比一致预期
fields.pit_rule: Consensus snapshot must be the value bundled with the published event, never a later revision
fields.usage_boundary: Vendor snapshot semantics must be confirmed before surprise construction

fields.label: 离线公告语义特征
fields.pit_rule: Feature is computed offline from the contemporaneous text and cached by announcement hash before backtesting
fields.usage_boundary: Backtest must reproduce from the frozen cache without network or API credentials

factor_priors.mechanism: Forecast magnitude, range, and type summarize management's disclosed earnings expectation
Management attribution, persistence, uncertainty, and one-off language may contain information beyond the structured range
Value, quality, momentum, volatility, and liquidity remain controls rather than the primary research claim

institution_rules.statement: A T-day factor may only use financial records with ann_date no later than T
A performance forecast published on T is usable from T+1 trading day because timestamp precision is inconsistent
LLM semantic extraction is an offline feature-engineering step; the backtest reads only a frozen hash-keyed cache
Train, validation, and out-of-sample partitions are chronological and are never randomly shuffled
